violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the ice cream area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (pickles) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
Chips were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety registered with RIDOH. Per PIC, application will be dropped off today. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The front service area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The sink and surface concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 704 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the sink and surface must be 704-1875 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
